title: ochthocharis bornensis
intro: Ochthocharis bornensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is also known as Bornense Thistle. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ochthocharis bornensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Ochthocharis bornensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
